judge_result.short_rationale: Core rinse action is present, but the answer adds an unsupported instruction to apply lotion/cream after washing, which is dangerous unsupported advice under the benchmark rules. It also puts clothing removal before the explicit immediate water rinse and changes escalation to only visible symptoms, missing the source condition of persistent symptoms or substantial exposure.
